attacking_style: Tends to attack mid-climb rather than at optimal moments, often too early or too late. Shows aggression on steep gradients (9-14%) but struggles with timing and energy management for complete climb profiles.
team_tactics: Operates with limited dedicated team support even when targeting GC. Increasingly deployed in flexible roles (leadout, support) rather than protected leader, suggesting tactical adaptation to diminished status.
terrain_preference: Excels on extremely steep sustained climbs (13km at 9-14% gradient) where pure climbing ability matters. Can bridge gaps alone and match younger climbers on gradient-heavy ascents despite age.
vulnerability: Poor energy pacing causes him to crack before summits when attacking early. Hesitant in tactical decision-making during critical race moments. Vulnerable to positioning errors in transition zones and crashes outside safe zones.
key_patterns: Attacks at suboptimal timing: too early mid-climb or too late on final climbs (3 instances)
Maintains climbing form matching younger riders on steep gradients despite advancing age (2 instances)
Tactical indecision at critical moments: unable to commit to moves or cooperation (2 instances)
Repeatedly bridges gaps through pure climbing strength but struggles with follow-through (3 instances)
Functions increasingly in support/flexible roles rather than protected GC leadership (2 instances)
Positioning errors and crash vulnerability cost GC time in non-climbing scenarios (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed mechanical while leading (strong position), 2022 matched young climbers on steep gradients but positioning errors persist. Age-defying climbing maintained but tactical sharpness inconsistent.
